testcase.name: test_forensic_calibration_post_returns_401_without_auth
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration68_forensic_channels.py:66: in test_forensic_calibration_post_returns_401_without_auth assert resp.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_forensic_calibration_get_returns_401_without_auth
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration68_forensic_channels.py:72: in test_forensic_calibration_get_returns_401_without_auth assert resp.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_channels_status_returns_401_without_auth
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration68_forensic_channels.py:162: in test_channels_status_returns_401_without_auth assert resp.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
